params.name: Stone of Sisyphus
params.description: Sisyphus was the first king of Corinth, known for his cunning and wit. However, he angered the gods, especially Zeus, by deceiving the Grim Reaper. After the death of Sisyphus, Zeus decided to punish him by pushing a huge stone up the mountain. Whenever the stone approached the top, it would roll back to the foot of the mountain, forcing Sisyphus to start this arduous task again. The story of the Stone of Sisyphus has had a profound impact in the fields of literature and philosophy, reminding pe …
